@@ -613,7 +613,7 @@
 {"id": "bd-gtf.6", "title": "L3 full-replace claim-control gate tied to prerequisite completion", "description": "Background:
- L3 full replacement claim has the highest compatibility and risk burden.

Scope:
- Define L3 dynamic-program battery and claim-control gate requiring completion of hard-parts, symbol coverage, and no-forbidden call-through conditions.
- Enforce claim immutability unless evidence set is complete.

Deliverables:
1) L3 claim gate specification.
2) Dynamic-program battery requirements.
3) Claim-control policy integrated into release process.

Acceptance Criteria:
- L3 claim blocked unless all prerequisite gates are satisfied.
- Any drift after claim invalidates release readiness.

Testing/Logging:
- Unit tests for claim-control logic.
- E2E L3 candidate runs on dynamic programs.
- Logs: trace_id, level=L3, prerequisite_status, claim_decision, blocking_reasons.", "acceptance_criteria": "## Acceptance Criteria

### Mandatory Verification Gate
1. Unit Test Evidence
- Add deterministic unit tests for nominal, boundary, and invalid-input paths in the touched modules.
- Include strict and hardened mode assertions when behavior differs by runtime mode.
- Include failure-mode tests covering repair/deny/default behavior with explicit expected outputs.

2. Integration + E2E Evidence
- Add or extend fixture-driven integration coverage in `tests/conformance` and/or `tests/integration` for this bead scope.
- Add a deterministic E2E script path (or harness command) with explicit setup/teardown and replayable seeds.
- Compare FrankenLibC outputs against host glibc fixtures (or documented replacement-level contract) for all touched symbols.

3. Logging + Traceability Evidence
- Emit structured logs (JSONL or deterministic text) that include bead ID, scenario ID, runtime mode, symbol family, decision path, and outcome.
- Verify logs expose repair/deny counters and reason codes so regressions are diagnosable from artifacts alone.
- Record artifact paths in bead notes (test logs, fixture diffs, benchmark outputs, conformance reports).

4. Performance + Regression Evidence
- Capture before/after baseline for latency/throughput on touched hot paths.
- Enforce no-regression threshold or document bounded tradeoff with quantitative rationale.

5. CI Gate Evidence
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo check --all-targets`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo test --all-targets`
- all bead-specific harness and E2E scripts pass with deterministic logs archived.", "notes": "## Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated for happy-path, edge-case, and invalid-input behavior.
- [ ] Property-style or fuzz-seed replay coverage added where state space is large/combinatorial.
- [ ] Integration fixtures added/updated in `tests/conformance` and validated against host glibc expectations.
- [ ] Deterministic E2E script/runner added or updated with explicit command lines and seed controls.
- [ ] Strict vs hardened behavior assertions are explicit and versioned in fixtures.
- [ ] Structured logs include: timestamp, bead ID, test scenario, runtime mode, symbol family, decision path, action (allow/repair/deny), and result.
- [ ] Failure logs include reason codes + minimal reproducible input payload metadata.
- [ ] Benchmark/perf logs include baseline, candidate, delta %, and pass/fail gate decision.
- [ ] CI artifacts include conformance report, E2E transcript, and summarized pass/fail matrix.
- [ ] Release/merge gate blocked if any required test or log artifact is missing.", "status": "closed", "priority": 0, "issue_type": "task", "assignee": "Codex", "created_at": "2026-02-12T15:04:28.978447649Z", "created_by": "ubuntu", "updated_at": "2026-04-07T22:16:38.699124611Z", "closed_at": "2026-04-07T22:16:38.698922589Z", "close_reason": "Implemented the L3 release-claim gate slice in the release dossier flow: added release_notes_hook output to the validator, hardened FLC_RELEASE_DOSSIER_RELEASE_NOTES_LIMIT parsing with warning+default fallback, and extended frankenlibc-harness release_dossier_validator_test coverage for closed-bead selection and invalid-limit handling. Verified with rch exec cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test release_dossier_validator_test and rch exec cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --test release_dossier_validator_test -- -D warnings; workspace cargo check passed, while workspace fmt/clippy still fail in unrelated frankenlibc-bench files.", "source_repo": ".", "compaction_level": 0, "original_size": 0, "labels": ["l3", "policy", "replacement"], "dependencies": [{"issue_id": "bd-gtf.6", "depends_on_id": "bd-1j4.5", "type": "blocks", "created_at": "2026-02-26T06:17:33Z", "created_by": "import", "metadata": "{}", "thread_id": ""}, {"issue_id": "bd-gtf.6", "depends_on_id": "bd-2vv.11", "type": "blocks", "created_at": "2026-02-26T06:17:33Z", "created_by": "import", "metadata": "{}", "thread_id": ""}, {"issue_id": "bd-gtf.6", "depends_on_id": "bd-gtf", "type": "parent-child", "created_at": "2026-02-26T06:17:33Z", "created_by": "import", "metadata": "{}", "thread_id": ""}, {"issue_id": "bd-gtf.6", "depends_on_id": "bd-gtf.5", "type": "blocks", "created_at": "2026-02-26T06:17:33Z", "created_by": "import", "metadata": "{}", "thread_id": ""}]}
 {"id": "bd-gtid", "title": "bd-1gh subtask: Strict+hardened verification pack and stub-retirement gate", "description": "Background:
- Stub elimination requires evidence that pthread_key APIs are production-usable under real threading workloads.

Goal:
- Build strict/hardened conformance+e2e verification pack for pthread_key APIs and retire stub status in target scope.

Deliverables:
1) Fixture and integration scenario set for key APIs.
2) Support matrix/status updates with explicit semantics.
3) Gate hooks to prevent regression to stub/callthrough behavior.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Tests pass in both modes with deterministic outputs.
- Stub/callthrough regressions fail guards.

Verification & Logging:
- Unit + e2e scripts with detailed structured logs and artifact links.", "status": "closed", "priority": 2, "issue_type": "task", "created_at": "2026-02-12T15:00:52.703424496Z", "created_by": "ubuntu", "updated_at": "2026-02-13T17:46:41.647974596Z", "closed_at": "2026-02-13T17:46:41.647906559Z", "source_repo": ".", "compaction_level": 0, "original_size": 0, "labels": ["critique", "e2e", "pthread", "testing", "verification"], "comments": [{"id": 1092, "issue_id": "bd-gtid", "author": "PurpleHawk", "text": "PurpleHawk: Created conformance fixture pack tests/conformance/fixtures/pthread_tls_keys.json with 16 cases covering all four TLS APIs (key_create, key_delete, getspecific, setspecific) plus destructor semantics. Covers: success paths, EAGAIN exhaustion, EINVAL for invalid/deleted/OOB keys, default zero value, roundtrip, destructor iteration and bounds, null-value skip. All 34 unit tests pass for both strict and hardened semantics.", "created_at": "2026-02-13T17:46:41Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-h05d","title":"Implement sscanf executor for scanf_conformance fixture tests","status":"completed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-18T17:12:39.886583353Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T17:30:50.037902569Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","scanf","testing"]}
-{"id":"bd-h2h5","title":"syscall: mount_setattr NULL pathname should return EINVAL exactly","description":"Host glibc returns EINVAL for mount_setattr(AT_FDCWD, NULL, 0, NULL, 0). Tighten the ABI regression from a broad errno family to an exact host-parity assertion for the null-path fast path.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"AmberSignal","created_at":"2026-04-21T07:37:35.038153706Z","created_by":"AmberSignal","updated_at":"2026-04-21T07:38:03.486650540Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"bd-h2h5","title":"syscall: mount_setattr NULL pathname should return EINVAL exactly","description":"Host glibc returns EINVAL for mount_setattr(AT_FDCWD, NULL, 0, NULL, 0). Tighten the ABI regression from a broad errno family to an exact host-parity assertion for the null-path fast path.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"AmberSignal","created_at":"2026-04-21T07:37:35.038153706Z","created_by":"AmberSignal","updated_at":"2026-04-21T07:39:27.706311440Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T07:39:27.702833586Z","close_reason":"Locked down host-parity mount_setattr(NULL) behavior: exact EINVAL instead of a broad errno family; verified locally and via rch.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-h5x","title":"EPIC: Remove glibc callthrough (raw syscalls + pthread primitives)","description":"Critique mapping: #2.

Goal: eliminate dependency on system glibc for core I/O/threading primitives when we claim replacement.

Deliverables:
- Raw syscall layer for Linux x86_64 (no libc::syscall).
- Futex-based pthread mutex primitives.
- Migrate ABIs to use the raw layer.

Acceptance:
- rg finds no libc pthread mutex call-through in the ‘replacement’ build profile.
- E2E smoke passes.

Verification Mandate:
- Every implementation child bead MUST ship comprehensive unit tests and deterministic e2e scripts (strict + hardened where applicable).
- Every test/e2e execution MUST emit detailed structured logs (trace_id, mode, symbol/API family, decision path, errno/outcome, timing, and artifact pointers).
- No bead may close without: test commands, expected outputs, and failure-log artifact examples documented in bead notes or linked reports.

Evidence & Test Requirements:
- Add comprehensive unit tests (happy-path, negative, adversarial, and regression cases) for all changed logic.
- Add or update deterministic e2e scripts that exercise strict and hardened modes where relevant.
- Emit structured detailed logs for test/e2e runs (trace_id, mode, API/symbol, outcome, errno, timing, and artifact refs).
- Bead cannot close until test commands and log artifact locations are documented.

## Success Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Success Criteria

### Mandatory Verification Gate
1. Unit Test Evidence
- Add deterministic unit tests for nominal, boundary, and invalid-input paths in the touched modules.
- Include strict and hardened mode assertions when behavior differs by runtime mode.
- Include failure-mode tests covering repair/deny/default behavior with explicit expected outputs.

2. Integration + E2E Evidence
- Add or extend fixture-driven integration coverage in `tests/conformance` and/or `tests/integration` for this bead scope.
- Add a deterministic E2E script path (or harness command) with explicit setup/teardown and replayable seeds.
- Compare FrankenLibC outputs against host glibc fixtures (or documented replacement-level contract) for all touched symbols.

3. Logging + Traceability Evidence
- Emit structured logs (JSONL or deterministic text) that include bead ID, scenario ID, runtime mode, symbol family, decision path, and outcome.
- Verify logs expose repair/deny counters and reason codes so regressions are diagnosable from artifacts alone.
- Record artifact paths in bead notes (test logs, fixture diffs, benchmark outputs, conformance reports).

4. Performance + Regression Evidence
- Capture before/after baseline for latency/throughput on touched hot paths.
- Enforce no-regression threshold or document bounded tradeoff with quantitative rationale.

5. CI Gate Evidence
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo check --all-targets`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo test --all-targets`
- all bead-specific harness and E2E scripts pass with deterministic logs archived.","notes":"RusticWolf session 27 (2026-03-09): Nativized 3 GCT symbols (175 remaining, down from 178):
- __call_tls_dtors: Native TLS destructor invocation via owned TLS_ATEXIT_LIST in startup_abi.rs. Drains in LIFO order matching glibc semantics.
- __idna_to_dns_encoding: Native RFC 3492 Punycode encoding for internationalized hostnames. Converts non-ASCII labels to xn-- ACE form.
- __idna_from_dns_encoding: Native Punycode decoding. Converts xn-- prefixed labels back to Unicode.
Added pub(crate) invoke_tls_dtors() in startup_abi.rs. Fixed pre-existing clippy issue in pthread_abi_test.rs (unnecessary unsafe block).
16 new integration tests: 12 IDNA (ASCII passthrough, Unicode encoding, Chinese, Japanese, roundtrip, null handling, case-insensitive prefix) + 4 TLS destructor (noop, invocation count, LIFO order, drain completeness).
All 154 glibc_internal_abi tests pass, 0 failures. 1915 total frankenlibc-abi tests.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"BlueLake","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:36:06.850671993Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-19T22:02:16.183703450Z","close_reason":"Remove glibc callthrough epic: host delegations reduced from ~102 to 12 intentional interpose. All non-threading families native. Pthread/dlfcn intentional interpose documented and classified.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["critique","pthread","syscall"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h5x","depends_on_id":"bd-130","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h5x","depends_on_id":"bd-144","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h5x","depends_on_id":"bd-24ug","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h5x","depends_on_id":"bd-25n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h5x","depends_on_id":"bd-27kh","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h5x","depends_on_id":"bd-2ez","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h5x","depends_on_id":"bd-33zg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h5x","depends_on_id":"bd-7ef9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h5x","depends_on_id":"bd-c1x","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h5x","depends_on_id":"bd-cj0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h5x","depends_on_id":"bd-ef2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h5x","depends_on_id":"bd-yos","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h5x","depends_on_id":"bd-z84","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1093,"issue_id":"bd-h5x","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Alien+Extreme uplift pass (2026-02-13): this epic is now covered by the full open-backlog EV matrix at artifacts/planning/open_beads_alien_uplift.v1.json (summary markdown: artifacts/planning/open_beads_alien_uplift.v1.md).

Execution contract applied:
- One-lever optimization waves only (profile -> prove -> implement -> verify).
- Budgeted mode + deterministic fallback trigger required per child bead.
- Graveyard route mappings and baseline comparators are pre-attached in matrix rows.
- Promotion gate: EV >= 2.0 and no cycle introduction in bv --robot-insights.","created_at":"2026-02-13T22:25:07Z"},{"id":1094,"issue_id":"bd-h5x","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Heads-up from bd-yos lane: fixed missing ABI symbol exports (mlock2, name_to_handle_at, open_by_handle_at) that were causing release link failures under libc.map and blocking pthread stress gate runs. Also updated mixed detach/join stress expectation to current passing behavior (expected_exit now 0), and check_bd1f35_thread_stress.sh now passes 8/8. This should reduce false negatives for pthread callthrough-removal verification.","created_at":"2026-02-22T06:32:12Z"},{"id":1095,"issue_id":"bd-h5x","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"RusticWolf progress: converted strptime from GlibcCallThrough to native Implemented. Full POSIX format string parser supporting %Y/%m/%d/%H/%M/%S/%b/%B/%a/%A/%I/%p/%j/%C/%y/%e/%n/%t/%%/%D/%T/%R/%F. 8 integration tests pass (crates/frankenlibc-abi/tests/time_abi_test.rs). GlibcCallThrough count reduced from 93 to 92 for time_abi family.","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:28:11Z"},{"id":1096,"issue_id":"bd-h5x","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"RusticWolf progress: converted fnmatch from GlibcCallThrough to native Implemented. Full POSIX pattern matching with *, ?, [...] bracket expressions (ranges, negation), escape handling, FNM_PATHNAME, FNM_PERIOD, FNM_CASEFOLD support. 10 integration tests pass. GlibcCallThrough reduced to 101.","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:35:20Z"},{"id":1239,"issue_id":"bd-h5x","author":"SnowyRabbit","text":"SnowyRabbit progress: converted six remaining stdio-vtable dlsym_passthrough symbols in glibc_internal_abi to deterministic native ENOSYS stubs (__overflow, __uflow, __underflow, __woverflow, __wuflow, __wunderflow), added focused ABI integration tests, and reclassified those six symbols in support_matrix from GlibcCallThrough -> Implemented. Verification (rch-offloaded): cargo check --workspace --all-targets PASS; cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test glibc_internal_abi_test PASS (71 passed); cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-abi --all-targets -D warnings PASS. Workspace clippy currently fails on unrelated pre-existing dead-code in frankenlibc-membrane/src/runtime_math/mod.rs (cached_check_orderings). cargo fmt --check also fails on unrelated pre-existing formatting drift in runtime_policy.rs.","created_at":"2026-02-27T04:26:44Z"}]}
 {"id": "bd-h5x.1", "title": "Call-through census + per-level forbidden policy map", "description": "Background:
- Claiming replacement requires a precise accounting of remaining glibc call-through paths.

Scope:
- Generate complete call-through census by symbol/family/profile (interpose vs replacement-oriented builds).
- Define forbidden call-through list for each replacement level with explicit temporary exceptions.

Deliverables:
1) Call-through census generator and artifact format.
2) Per-level forbidden/allowed policy list.
3) Gap report mapped to implementation owners.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Census is reproducible and covers all exported ABI entrypoints.
- Every remaining call-through is classified as permitted temporary exception or blocker.

Testing/Logging:
- Unit tests for census parser and classification logic.
- E2E run on smoke corpus verifying census stability.
- Logs: trace_id, symbol, family, callthrough_target, profile, policy_class.", "acceptance_criteria": "## Acceptance Criteria

### Mandatory Verification Gate
1. Unit Test Evidence
- Add deterministic unit tests for nominal, boundary, and invalid-input paths in the touched modules.
- Include strict and hardened mode assertions when behavior differs by runtime mode.
- Include failure-mode tests covering repair/deny/default behavior with explicit expected outputs.

2. Integration + E2E Evidence
- Add or extend fixture-driven integration coverage in `tests/conformance` and/or `tests/integration` for this bead scope.
- Add a deterministic E2E script path (or harness command) with explicit setup/teardown and replayable seeds.
- Compare FrankenLibC outputs against host glibc fixtures (or documented replacement-level contract) for all touched symbols.

3. Logging + Traceability Evidence
- Emit structured logs (JSONL or deterministic text) that include bead ID, scenario ID, runtime mode, symbol family, decision path, and outcome.
- Verify logs expose repair/deny counters and reason codes so regressions are diagnosable from artifacts alone.
- Record artifact paths in bead notes (test logs, fixture diffs, benchmark outputs, conformance reports).

4. Performance + Regression Evidence
- Capture before/after baseline for latency/throughput on touched hot paths.
- Enforce no-regression threshold or document bounded tradeoff with quantitative rationale.

5. CI Gate Evidence
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo check --all-targets`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo test --all-targets`
- all bead-specific harness and E2E scripts pass with deterministic logs archived.", "notes": "## Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated for happy-path, edge-case, and invalid-input behavior.
- [ ] Property-style or fuzz-seed replay coverage added where state space is large/combinatorial.
- [ ] Integration fixtures added/updated in `tests/conformance` and validated against host glibc expectations.
- [ ] Deterministic E2E script/runner added or updated with explicit command lines and seed controls.
- [ ] Strict vs hardened behavior assertions are explicit and versioned in fixtures.
- [ ] Structured logs include: timestamp, bead ID, test scenario, runtime mode, symbol family, decision path, action (allow/repair/deny), and result.
- [ ] Failure logs include reason codes + minimal reproducible input payload metadata.
- [ ] Benchmark/perf logs include baseline, candidate, delta %, and pass/fail gate decision.
- [ ] CI artifacts include conformance report, E2E transcript, and summarized pass/fail matrix.
- [ ] Release/merge gate blocked if any required test or log artifact is missing.", "status": "closed", "priority": 1, "issue_type": "task", "created_at": "2026-02-12T15:04:26.662924825Z", "created_by": "ubuntu", "updated_at": "2026-02-22T07:25:30.143863540Z", "closed_at": "2026-02-22T07:25:30.143841078Z", "close_reason": "Acceptance met: call-through census/policy map aligned with support matrix + fixture coverage, and replacement guard/census gates now pass deterministically", "source_repo": ".", "compaction_level": 0, "original_size": 0, "labels": ["pthread", "replacement", "syscall"], "dependencies": [{"issue_id": "bd-h5x.1", "depends_on_id": "bd-7ef9", "type": "blocks", "created_at": "2026-02-26T06:17:33Z", "created_by": "import", "metadata": "{}", "thread_id": ""}, {"issue_id": "bd-h5x.1", "depends_on_id": "bd-h5x", "type": "parent-child", "created_at": "2026-02-26T06:17:33Z", "created_by": "import", "metadata": "{}", "thread_id": ""}], "comments": [{"id": 1097, "issue_id": "bd-h5x.1", "author": "Codex", "text": "Claiming bd-h5x.1 now. Initial gate status: scripts/check_callthrough_census.sh fails because tests/conformance/callthrough_census.v1.json is stale versus support_matrix. Working lane: regenerate census artifact deterministically, re-run guard, and record policy-map consistency evidence before closure.", "created_at": "2026-02-22T07:14:15Z"}, {"id": 1098, "issue_id": "bd-h5x.1", "author": "Dicklesworthstone", "text": "Completed policy/census alignment and removed non-allowlisted direct libc call-throughs. Evidence: bash scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh PASS (0 failures, 48 call-throughs confined to allowlisted modules); Check 2b PASS with 11 tracked families + 22 fixtures; bash scripts/check_callthrough_census.sh PASS (symbols=93 modules=11 waves=11). Code updates in crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/{setjmp_abi.rs,wchar_abi.rs,dirent_abi.rs,signal_abi.rs,startup_abi.rs,dlfcn_abi.rs,stdlib_abi.rs,time_abi.rs,stdio_abi.rs}, scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh, tests/conformance/replacement_profile.json, tests/conformance/replacement_zero_unapproved_fixtures.v1.json.", "created_at": "2026-02-22T07:25:29Z"}]}
 {"id": "bd-h5x.2", "title": "Pthread primitive closure wave beyond mutex/condvar/thread bootstrap", "description": "Background:
- Existing work addresses mutex/thread bootstrap, but remaining primitives can still hide glibc dependence.

Scope:
- Close remaining pthread primitive call-throughs (rwlock, barrier, once, attr/timeouts where in target scope).
- Ensure ABI paths route to internal/raw implementations with deterministic fallback policies.

Deliverables:
1) Primitive-by-primitive replacement plan.
2) Implemented routing updates and conformance fixtures.
3) Branch metrics for contention/wait/timeout behavior.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Target pthread primitives in replacement profile show zero disallowed call-through.
- Strict/hardened tests pass for covered primitives.

Testing/Logging:
- Unit tests for state machines and edge/error paths.
- E2E concurrency fixtures with strict/hardened comparisons.
- Logs: trace_id, primitive, mode, path(internal/raw/fallback), errno, timing.", "acceptance_criteria": "## Acceptance Criteria

### Mandatory Verification Gate
1. Unit Test Evidence
- Add deterministic unit tests for nominal, boundary, and invalid-input paths in the touched modules.
- Include strict and hardened mode assertions when behavior differs by runtime mode.
- Include failure-mode tests covering repair/deny/default behavior with explicit expected outputs.

2. Integration + E2E Evidence
- Add or extend fixture-driven integration coverage in `tests/conformance` and/or `tests/integration` for this bead scope.
- Add a deterministic E2E script path (or harness command) with explicit setup/teardown and replayable seeds.
- Compare FrankenLibC outputs against host glibc fixtures (or documented replacement-level contract) for all touched symbols.

3. Logging + Traceability Evidence
- Emit structured logs (JSONL or deterministic text) that include bead ID, scenario ID, runtime mode, symbol family, decision path, and outcome.
- Verify logs expose repair/deny counters and reason codes so regressions are diagnosable from artifacts alone.
- Record artifact paths in bead notes (test logs, fixture diffs, benchmark outputs, conformance reports).

4. Performance + Regression Evidence
- Capture before/after baseline for latency/throughput on touched hot paths.
- Enforce no-regression threshold or document bounded tradeoff with quantitative rationale.

5. CI Gate Evidence
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo check --all-targets`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo test --all-targets`
- all bead-specific harness and E2E scripts pass with deterministic logs archived.", "notes": "## Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated for happy-path, edge-case, and invalid-input behavior.
- [ ] Property-style or fuzz-seed replay coverage added where state space is large/combinatorial.
- [ ] Integration fixtures added/updated in `tests/conformance` and validated against host glibc expectations.
- [ ] Deterministic E2E script/runner added or updated with explicit command lines and seed controls.
- [ ] Strict vs hardened behavior assertions are explicit and versioned in fixtures.
- [ ] Structured logs include: timestamp, bead ID, test scenario, runtime mode, symbol family, decision path, action (allow/repair/deny), and result.
- [ ] Failure logs include reason codes + minimal reproducible input payload metadata.

See bd-zh1y.1 for tracking.", "created_at": "2026-04-01T17:57:40Z"}, {"id": 1369, "issue_id": "bd-h5x.2", "author": "LavenderMarsh", "text": "Progress update on pthread attr/cancel cleanup: patched pthread_mutex_init and pthread_cond_init host-delegating paths to reject destroyed attr words (word == 0) and invalid managed attr bitfields before translation. mutex_init_rejects_destroyed_attr, cond_init_rejects_destroyed_attr, and mutex_init_rejects_unsupported_extension_attributes now pass via rch. Follow-up fix in the same lane: converted the test-only FORCE_NATIVE_THREADING override from process-global behavior to a thread-local override with global fallback, then routed pthread ABI delegation checks through force_native_threading_enabled(). This removes cross-test interference in pthread_abi_test, where isolated passes were failing only in the full binary due to concurrent override leakage. Verification so far: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_check_lavendermarsh_pthreadfix cargo check -p frankenlibc-abi --tests PASS, rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_ws_check_lavendermarsh6 cargo check --workspace --all-targets PASS, rch exec -- cargo fmt --check PASS. Running remaining evidence now: full pthread_abi_test rerun and workspace clippy.", "created_at": "2026-04-03T18:56:33Z"}, {"id": 1370, "issue_id": "bd-h5x.2", "author": "LavenderMarsh", "text": "Additional verification note: workspace clippy finished clean via rch (env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_ws_clippy_lavendermarsh6 cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings). Waiting only on final test-result line now.", "created_at": "2026-04-03T19:00:20Z"}, {"id": 1372, "issue_id": "bd-h5x.2", "author": "LavenderMarsh", "text": "Found the remaining pthread_abi_test stall: native_condvar_wait_rejects_host_mutex_mismatch was stale and constructed a host condvar + host mutex pair while asserting the native mismatch EINVAL path, so it blocked forever.
